notes: Do not keep Acts (General) as a secondary keyword.
Use plain Acts only where Acts is materially discussed and no primary Acts-related theme already covers the article.

Articles with primary themes such as Paul in Acts, Acts Historicity, Apocryphal Acts, Luke-Acts Authorship, Luke-Acts Atonement, Luke-Acts Christology, or Miracles in Acts are already searchable by Acts in the demo because keyword matching uses substring inclusion.
